literature.title: HAC-Net: A Hybrid Attention-Based Convolutional Neural Network for Highly Accurate Protein–Ligand Binding Affinity Prediction
literature.journal: Journal of Chemical Information and Modeling

data_repo.description: Extracted features for many datasets and for deeper analyses (e.g., ablation studies), model weights, intermediate graphs

code_repo.readme_description: HAC-Net combines a 3D convolutional neural network with graph convolutional networks to predict protein-ligand binding affinity, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the PDBbind benchmark. The repository provides model code, pretrained weights, and scripts for training and evaluation.

study_fork.changes_summary: Added a self-contained CLI script (`HACNet_CLI.py`) enabling single-pass batch inference over the CASF-2016 coreset without the original notebook workflow; added a conda environment file, a shell driver script, and a utility to merge per-complex prediction CSVs.

reproducibility.failure_notes: The limitations in reproducibility are likely, in large part, from the use of the no-longer-supported ACC2 API for charge calculation.
